cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30.5.0)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "C:/Qt/6.11.1/llvm-mingw_64/lib/cmake/Qt6;C:/Qt/6.11.1/llvm-mingw_64/lib/cmake/Qt6/3rdparty/extra-cmake-modules/find-modules;C:/Qt/6.11.1/llvm-mingw_64/lib/cmake/Qt6/3rdparty/kwin")
cmake_policy(SET CMP0126 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0128 OLD)
project(CMAKE_TRY_COMPILE CXX)
set(CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} ${COMPILE_DEFINITIONS}")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG "-g")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "")
set(CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS} ${EXE_LINKER_FLAGS}")
include_directories(${INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES})
set(CMAKE_SUPPRESS_REGENERATION 1)
link_directories(${LINK_DIRECTORIES})
cmake_policy(SET CMP0065 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0083 NEW)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0155 OLD)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0157 OLD)
include("${CMAKE_ROOT}/Modules/Internal/HeaderpadWorkaround.cmake")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "C:/Users/lesli/Desktop/projects/Boomba-FM-Music-Player/app/build/Desktop_Qt_6_11_1_llvm_mingw_64_bit_Debug/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-09j41w")
add_executable(cmTC_d4c9a)
target_sources(cmTC_d4c9a PRIVATE
  "C:/Users/lesli/Desktop/projects/Boomba-FM-Music-Player/app/build/Desktop_Qt_6_11_1_llvm_mingw_64_bit_Debug/CMakeFiles/CMakeScratch/TryCompile-09j41w/CheckForPthreads.cxx"
)
file(GENERATE OUTPUT "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/cmTC_d4c9a_loc"
     CONTENT $<TARGET_FILE:cmTC_d4c9a>)
set_property(TARGET cmTC_d4c9a PROPERTY "CXX_STANDARD" "17")
set_property(TARGET cmTC_d4c9a PROPERTY "CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED" "ON")
target_link_libraries(cmTC_d4c9a ${LINK_LIBRARIES})
